description: Durable human wait tokens, human action APIs, CLI/debug workflow controls, Projects tab status/actions, and a Workflow/XState visualization tab without V1 editing.

userStories.title: Persist human wait tokens and action records
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want approval/input waits to survive restart so that my pending decision is not lost.
acceptanceCriteria: Human node or requestHumanInput command creates workflow_wait_tokens row before returning control
Wait token statuses represent pending/open, resolved, expired, and cancelled states or accepted equivalents
Accepted actions write workflow_human_actions, resolve token, emit events, and schedule wakeup/resume with correlation id and payload
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement built-in and registry-backed human actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want custom human actions to use the same token model so that future actions do not require a new runtime path.
acceptanceCriteria: Built-in action kinds include approve, reject, resume, and cancel
Additional action kinds register through registerWorkflowHumanAction
Runtime validates token status, action availability, schema, expiry, actor, and run ownership before applying action
Negative tests cover invalid payload, expired token, already-resolved token, unauthorized/invalid actor, and missing run
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add CLI/debug workflow control commands
userStories.description: As an operator, I want CLI/debug controls so that I can inspect and manage workflows without UI dependence.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI/debug exposes workflow list, validate, run, inspect, approve, reject, resume, and cancel commands or equivalents in existing CLI style
Approve/reject/resume/cancel operate on the same persisted wait token model used by UI
V1 does not add an XState CLI command
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose workflow status and human actions in Projects tab
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I want to see why a workflow is waiting or failed so that I know the next action.
acceptanceCriteria: Projects tab lists pending human actions for associated workflow/project/session
Project UI shows workflow id, status, current node/state, node statuses, final output where permitted, validation errors, waiting reason, and available actions
Project UI submits action payloads with actor metadata
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add dedicated Workflow/XState visualization tab
userStories.description: As a user, I want a workflow visualization so that I can understand current runtime state.
acceptanceCriteria: Dedicated Web UI Workflow/XState tab renders visualization from projection data and current runtime snapshot
The tab uses Pibo/XState projection and does not edit raw XState JSON
Full visual workflow creation/editing is explicitly deferred in V1
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Route human action outcomes through runtime edges
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want human outcomes to route predictably so that approval, rejection, resume, timeout, and cancellation are modeled.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime routes approval, rejection, timeout, cancellation, invalid resume, and normal resume through declared normal/error/resume edges when present
Resume payloads validate against the human node schema before workflow execution continues
Executor results distinguish approved, rejected, submitted, and timed_out decisions when applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
